data.title: Global water and sewage construction projects valued at $630+ billion in pipeline, with top 20 projects per region, per report.
data.description: A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Water and Sewage Construction Projects (Q4 2025)" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report offers a comprehensive analysis of water and sewage construction projects on a global scale, drawing from projects monitored by the analyst. Currently, the analyst is monitoring water and sewage construction projects amounting to a total value of $630.9 billion. These projects encompass all stages from initial planning (announcement and study) through to completion.

data.title: Global office building construction projects worth $852.6 billion, with 75.6% in pre-execution/execution stages, per Q4 2025 report.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report on global office building construction projects shows a pipeline valued at $852.6 billion. The analysis indicates that 75.6% of this total ($644.2 billion) is in the pre-execution and execution phases, with the remaining 24.4% ($208.4 billion) in pre-planning and planning stages. Western Europe leads with a 23.0% regional share in this analysis.

data.title: Prizm Insurance partners with Holistiplan for one-click insurance reviews, benefiting thousands of advisors nationwide.
data.description: In Chicago, on January 27, 2026, Prizm Insurance, Inc. revealed a new collaboration with Holistiplan, a financial planning software platform popular among tens of thousands of advisors across the country. Through this partnership, advisors are now able to conduct insurance reviews and pinpoint key opportunities for their clients.

data.title: Ziebart introduces Gold Shield Protection Program for car dealerships to apply in-house services, expanding nationwide.
data.description: The Gold Shield Protection Program allows car dealerships to offer specific Ziebart protection services on-site. It expands on existing in-house dealer programs in the Ziebart franchise system. This initiative will be launched for the auto retail sector at the 2026 National event.

data.title: Global baby food market to reach USD 213.21 billion by 2035, up from USD 85.25 billion in 2025, with focus on clinical-grade and "zero-sugar" formulas.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware on January 27, 2026, Future Market Insights Inc. (FMI) released findings on the global baby food market, predicting a significant growth from USD 85.25 billion in 2025 to an estimated USD 213.21 billion by 2035. This marks a substantial trajectory...

data.title: AllsWell partners with LEAP GEO at CES 2026 to enhance brand growth in generative search era.LAS VEGAS, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: During CES 2026 in Las Vegas, AllsWell revealed a new partnership with LEAP GEO aimed at aiding brands in transitioning from exposure to AI citations and recommendations. This collaboration was announced on January 27, 2026. AllsWell, a renowned global brand communications and public relations consultancy, made this announcement at the 2026 Consumer Electronics Show.

data.title: Fulcrum and KPMG partner to revolutionize utility field operations in a $X million collaboration.
data.description: In San Francisco on January 27, 2026, Fulcrum, an AI-powered platform for field process management and data collection, revealed a new partnership with KPMG LLP. This collaboration aims to combine their expertise in utilities strategy and field technology, ensuring a seamless connection between vision and practical execution. Fulcrum's innovative approach, coupled with KPMG LLP's experience in audit and tax services, signifies a coordinated effort to enhance operational efficiency in the industry. The collaboration between Fulcrum and KPMG LLP is set to revolutionize the utility sector by leveraging advanced technologies and strategic insights to drive impactful changes.

data.title: AI tech in medical imaging disrupts $45B market in 2026, showing shift towards precision. - USANewsGroup.com.
data.description: Ventripoint Diagnostics Ltd, of Vancouver, BC, announced on Jan. 27, 2026, that the global medical imaging market reached an impressive $45.5 billion in the same year. This signifies a significant transition towards AI-native precision within the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin price forecast suggests sub-$80,000 bottom this week in new Wyckoff analysis, before month-end "spring" event.
data.description: An analysis of Bitcoin's price predicted that the Wyckoff "spring" event would occur before the month ends, with prices potentially falling below $80,000.
